h1: Shingle Colors by Brand: Every Major Color, Side by Side
meta_title: Shingle Colors by Brand · See Them On Your House (2026)
meta_description: Browse every shingle color from GAF, CertainTeed, IKO, Owens Corning, and more. Real install photos, install pricing, and a free tool to see any color on your house in seconds.
hub_intro: Every shingle color worth installing in Florida, in one place. We cover the major lines from GAF, CertainTeed, IKO, TAMKO, Atlas, Malarkey, and Owens Corning. Each color page has real install photos on Florida homes, the exact shade you'll see in daylight, install pricing, and side-by-side picks from other brands that get the same look. Upload a photo of your house to try any color on your own roof in seconds.
